title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates an automated video generation workflow that uses Claude Code to orchestrate planning, code generation, voice synthesis, visual generation, and music selection into a complete production pipeline. The system uses Archon as a workflow engine and HyperFrames as a video generation framework to automate end-to-end video production without manual editing or separate production roles.
